title: Black Pepper Tuscan Herb Soup
description: A tender and herbal soup perfect for sick days or any Italian-inspired dish that features low-sodium-friendly ingredients with a dash of black pepper to enhance its flavor.
instructions: In a large pot, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add diced carrots and onions to sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Pour in vegetable broth, add thyme leaves, bay leaf, red pepper flakes, salt, and black pepper. Bring the soup to a simmer.
Let it simmer for 20-30 minutes until vegetables are tender.
Using an immersion blender or transferring the mixture to a regular blender, puree half of the soup until smooth.
Return the pureed soup back into the pot with remaining broth and bring back to a gentle boil.
If using heavy cream, stir it in last. Simmer for another 5 minutes before serving.
Serve hot as is or garnish with fresh herbs if desired.
